name: Taung Gold International Limited
summary: Taung Gold International Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the exploration, development, and mining of gold and related minerals in the Republic of South Africa and Hong Kong. Its flagship projects include the Evander project, which comprises the No. 6 Shaft area and the Twistdraai area on the northeastern limb of the Witwatersrand basin located in the Mpumalanga Province; and the Jeanette project located in the southwest limb of the Witwatersrand basin to the northeast of Welkom in the Free State Province of South Africa. The company also trades in and sells minerals. Taung Gold International Limited was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Tsuen Wan, Hong Kong.
